title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.270 - Form of information
text:
545.270.  Form of information. — An information filed in writing and as allowed by supreme court rule may be in the following form:  
(RSMo 1939 § 3896, A.L. 1997 S.B. 248) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3506; 1919 § 3851; 1909 § 5059
